query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `game_pet_catalog` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `race` varchar(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'normal',
  `wuxing` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'earth',
  `rarity` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'common',
  `growth_type` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'balanced',
  `base_bp_constitution` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  `base_bp_strength` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  `base_bp_defense` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  `base_bp_agility` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  `base_bp_magic` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  `race_hp_multiplier` float NOT NULL DEFAULT 1.0,
  `min_level` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `max_level` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 50,
  `base_capture_rate` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 30,
  `image_url` text,
  `is_active` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `sort_order` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `game_pet_catalog_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `game_pet_innate_skills` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `pet_catalog_id` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `skill_type` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'attack',
  `wuxing` varchar(20),
  `power_percent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
  `mp_cost` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 5,
  `cooldown` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 2,
  `unlock_level` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `slot_index` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `sort_order` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `game_pet_innate_skills_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `game_player_pets` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `agent_id` int NOT NULL,
  `pet_catalog_id` int NOT NULL,
  `nickname` varchar(100),
  `level` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `exp` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `tier` varchar(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'C',
  `bp_constitution` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  `bp_strength` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  `bp_defense` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  `bp_agility` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  `bp_magic` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  `hp` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 50,
  `max_hp` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 50,
  `mp` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 30,
  `max_mp` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 30,
  `attack` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
  `defense` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
  `speed` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
  `magic_attack` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
  `growth_type` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'balanced',
  `is_active` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `friendship` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `captured_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `game_player_pets_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `game_pet_learned_skills` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `player_pet_id` int NOT NULL,
  `skill_name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `skill_type` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'attack',
  `skill_key` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `wuxing` varchar(20),
  `power_percent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
  `mp_cost` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 8,
  `cooldown` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 3,
  `skill_level` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `usage_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `slot_index` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 4,
  `is_equipped` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `learned_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `game_pet_learned_skills_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
